headline: Palantir and GE Aerospace Are Working Together on Military Aircraft. Is PLTR or GE Stock a Better Buy Here?
summary: Palantir offers higher‑growth, higher‑volatility upside as an AI defense software pure play, while GE Aerospace provides steadier, cash‑rich exposure to aircraft and engine demand; which is “better” depends on whether you prioritize aggressive capital gains (PLTR) or more predictable compounding with a dividend (GE).

headline: U.S. Makes Another Rare-Earths Deal. But the Threat of Shortages Persists.
summary: The Defense Department continues to secure supply of rare earth materials, this time from Australian producer Lynas.

raw.headline: U.S. Makes Another Rare-Earths Deal. But the Threat of Shortages Persists.

headline: GE Aerospace to invest $12 million in Hooksett plant
summary: GE Aerospace will invest more than $12 million into its site in Hooksett as part of a $1 billion investment into its U.S. manufacturing sites and suppliers this year. The funds will be used to add and upgrade machines, add inspection equipment and make building improvements, according to the company. GE Aerospace is also committed to hiring more than 5,000 additional workers nationwide. This ...

headline: Dubai International Airport resumes 'limited' flights after drone attack
summary: Dubai International Airport resumed a limited flight schedule Monday morning after a drone attack hit a fuel depot, causing a fire.

raw.headline: Dubai International Airport resumes 'limited' flights after drone attack
